jp.title: サッカー日本代表に遠藤航、冨安健洋、板倉滉がついに合流！実戦形式やスローイン確認でアイスランド代表戦へ照準【練習レポート】（フットボールチャンネル）

jp.title: 明日の株式相場に向けて＝「ＭＬＣＣ狂騒曲」ＡＩ特需の旋律に乗る
jp.description: きょう（２８日）の東京株式市場は、日経平均株価が前営業日比３０６円安の６万４６９３円と反落。早いもので実質６月相場入りとなったが、相変わらず投資家の思惑から外れた地合いに振り回される展開が続く。前日の米国株市場でＮＹダウが最高値を更新したほか・・・。

jp.title: “毎日の買い物”特化のローソン新業態 ミニスーパー「Lミニマート」開店

jp.title: ネアンデルタール人が4万年前に残した「赤い点」の謎

jp.title: 「AIに惑わされる人類」アカデミー受賞の超有名監督 巨人阿部前監督の復帰署名に賛同も「娘は何も悪くない」と批判続出

jp.title: 金星と木星が接近する夜に“星空外気浴”。おふろcafe かりんの湯、サウナガーデンで天体観測イベントを6月10日開催
jp.description: ［THE FARM］2026年6月10日（水）19:00～21:00、日没後の西の空で接近する金星と木星を眺めながら、温泉・サウナ・外気浴と星空観測を楽しむ一夜限定イベントを開催します。株式会社ザファーム（所在地：千葉県香取市）が運営する「おふろcafe かりんの湯」では、2026年6月10日（水）19:00～21:00に、金星と木星の接近にあわせた天体観測イベントを開催します。当日は、サウナガーデンに天体望遠鏡を設置し、スタッフのサポートのもと、入館者は予約不要・自由参加で天体観測を楽しめます…

world.title: Miller ‘does it all’ for Hurricanes in Game 4 win in Eastern Final
world.description: Defenseman helps Carolina move within 1 victory of Cup Final in 1st season with team

world.title: Boy, 15, charged with sexually assaulting 10 girls including rape of child under 13
world.description: The 15-year old has been charged with 22 sexual offences against 10 schoolgirls, including two rapes, twelve sexual assaults, and possessing images of child and animal abuse.

world.title: WTK family feud heads to apex court
world.description: Kathryn Ma Wai Fong, widow of late WTK Holdings Bhd (KL:WTK) chief executive officer Datuk Wong Kie Nai, has sought leave from the Federal Court to appeal a ruling over disputed family shareholdings tied to WTK Group — one of Sarawak’s most influential and wealthy families.

world.title: Ashok Leyland Q4: Net Profit Rises 14%; Dividend Declared - Check Record Date
world.description: Consolidate revenue of Ashok Leyland advanced by 17.4% year-on-year for the three months ended March, reaching Rs 17,246 crore in comparison to Rs 14,695 crore.

world.title: Estonian Artists' Association defrauded of 700,000 euros; perpetrators arrested
world.description: Estonian police on the 25th of May detained two people in connection with a 700,000 euro fraud from the Artists' Association.

world.title: New HIV treatment could allow patients to go drug-free for two years
world.description: A quarter of people who took the new antibody mix were able to go two years without taking a daily antiviral pill

world.title: Latvia builds anti-tank defenses along border with Russia
world.description: Latvia's National Armed Forces have begun installing the so-called dragon's teeth barriers and anti-tank trenches along the entire border with Russia.

world.title: Teen slashes wrist, throat after barred from meeting boyfriend
world.description: The 14-year-old, who was allegedly high on a drug-laced vape, is now in stable condition.
